comments.comment: Formaldehyde emission rates were determined using burner operating hours and stack test data from September 2008. A comparable rate was calculated for the past five years, but it wasn't necessary to report formaldehyde until 2022. Formaldehyde reporting became mandatory in 2022 due to updated regulations for reporting Part 5 speciated VOCs.
